scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aslaaa-pt/api && npm run build --workspace @aslaaa-pt/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @aslaaa-pt/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @aslaaa-pt/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @aslaaa-pt/api && npm run test --workspace @aslaaa-pt/web
